source_document: TAHAL 2008 (הערכת פוטנציאל והיקף זיהום מי תהום מתעשייה באקויפר החוף-A.pdf + -B.pdf)
extraction_notes: Raanana industrial zone is NOT included in the TAHAL 2008 coastal aquifer study. The study assessed 162 industrial zones along the coastal aquifer (אקויפר החוף) and selected the top 10 for detailed monitoring plans (TAHAL 2008 Part B, Table 14.1). The 10 selected zones are: Kiryat Sapir, Ashkelon South, Kiryat Eliezer, Rishon Lezion New, Rehovot Science Park, Hadera, Ashdod 1+2, Or Akiva Old, Rishon Lezion Old, Rachtman. Raanana was not among the top 23 zones screened (Table 2) and received no dedicated section in the document. Raanana entered the monitoring system as part of the 2021 expansion to 18 zones (see base_layer/report_2021/raanana.json). The earliest monitoring data for Raanana is from the Excel dataset starting 2011.
historical_note: Previous version of this file (seeded 2026-05-03) incorrectly contained Hadera borehole data (coordinates 191392/707257 = נ.ת. חדרה 1 per TAHAL 2008 Table 9.1). This was a seeding error. Corrected 2026-05-03 after systematic review of TAHAL 2008 Part A+B.
